per_query.nl_prompt: How many films are in each rating category?

mode_a.sql: SELECT "film"."rating", COUNT("film"."rental_rate") AS "film_count" FROM "film" GROUP BY "film"."rating"

per_query.nl_prompt: Top 5 customers by total number of rentals

mode_a.sql: SELECT "rental"."customer_id", COUNT("rental"."rental_id") AS "total_rentals" FROM "rental" LEFT OUTER JOIN "customer" ON "rental"."customer_id" = "customer"."customer_id" GROUP BY "rental"."customer_id" ORDER BY "total_rentals" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS total_rentals
FROM customer c
JOIN rental r ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
ORDER BY total_rentals DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: Total revenue by film category, top 5

mode_a.sql: SELECT "sales_by_film_category"."category", SUM("sales_by_film_category"."total_sales") AS "total_revenue" FROM "sales_by_film_category" GROUP BY "sales_by_film_category"."category" ORDER BY "total_revenue" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT c.name AS category, SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue
FROM payment p
JOIN rental r ON p.rental_id = r.rental_id
JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
JOIN film_category fc ON i.film_id = fc.film_id
JOIN category c ON fc.category_id = c.category_id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: How many distinct films does each store have in inventory?

mode_a.sql: SELECT "inventory"."store_id", COUNT(DISTINCT "inventory"."film_id") AS "distinct_films_count" FROM "inventory" GROUP BY "inventory"."store_id"

per_query.nl_prompt: Which actors appear in the most films? Top 5

mode_a.sql: SELECT "film_actor"."actor_id", "actor"."first_name", "actor"."last_name", COUNT("film_actor"."film_id") AS "film_count" FROM "film_actor" LEFT OUTER JOIN "actor" ON "film_actor"."actor_id" = "actor"."actor_id" GROUP BY "film_actor"."actor_id", "actor"."first_name", "actor"."last_name" ORDER BY "film_count" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT a.actor_id, a.first_name, a.last_name, COUNT(fa.film_id) AS film_count
FROM actor a
JOIN film_actor fa ON a.actor_id = fa.actor_id
GROUP BY a.actor_id, a.first_name, a.last_name
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: Which countries have the most customers? Top 5

mode_a.sql: SELECT "country"."country", COUNT("customer"."customer_id") AS "customer_count" FROM "customer" LEFT OUTER JOIN "address" ON "customer"."address_id" = "address"."address_id" LEFT OUTER JOIN "city" ON "address"."city_id" = "city"."city_id" LEFT OUTER JOIN "country" ON "city"."country_id" = "country"."country_id" GROUP BY "country"."country" ORDER BY "customer_count" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT co.country, COUNT(c.customer_id) AS customer_count
FROM customer c
JOIN address a ON c.address_id = a.address_id
JOIN city ci ON a.city_id = ci.city_id
JOIN country co ON ci.country_id = co.country_id
GROUP BY co.country
ORDER BY customer_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: Average rental duration in days by film rating

mode_a.sql: SELECT "film"."rating", AVG("film"."rental_duration") AS "average_rental_duration" FROM "film" GROUP BY "film"."rating"

per_query.nl_prompt: What is the original language of each film?

mode_a.sql: SELECT "film"."title", "language"."name" FROM "film" LEFT OUTER JOIN "language" ON "film"."language_id" = "language"."language_id"

per_query.nl_prompt: Show customer full names (first and last name combined)

mode_b.sql: SELECT first_name || ' ' || last_name AS full_name FROM customer;

per_query.nl_prompt: How many rentals have not been returned yet?

mode_a.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "unreturned_rentals" FROM "rental" WHERE "rental"."return_date" IS NULL

per_query.nl_prompt: What is the total revenue from all payments?

mode_b.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM payment;

per_query.nl_prompt: List customers from the United States

mode_b.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email
FROM customer c
JOIN address a ON c.address_id = a.address_id
JOIN city ci ON a.city_id = ci.city_id
JOIN country co ON ci.country_id = co.country_id
WHERE co.country = 'United States';
